results.title: Obituary: Robert Francis Macdonald
results.description: Robert Francis Macdonald, a loving and beloved family patriarch, died on June 8, 2026. A longtime resident of Bridgton, Maine, he was 84, just 34 days from his 85th birthday. He was a good man.
